scripts.build: pnpm run build:remark-plantuml && pnpm run build:tooling && pnpm run build:ui && pnpm run build:immersive
scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run lint && pnpm run fmt:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.deps:update: pnpm dlx npm-check-updates -u --workspaces --target latest --packageManager pnpm && pnpm install
scripts.fmt: oxfmt --config .oxfmtrc.mjs apps packages package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.package-aliases.json vitest.config.ts .oxfmtrc.mjs .oxlintrc.json .github/workflows/publish-packages.yml
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --config .oxfmtrc.mjs --check apps packages package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.package-aliases.json vitest.config.ts .oxfmtrc.mjs .oxlintrc.json .github/workflows/publish-packages.yml
scripts.publish:dry-run: pnpm --filter @jongminchung/remark-plantuml run publish:dry-run && pnpm --filter @jongminchung/tooling run publish:dry-run && pnpm --filter @jongminchung/ui run publish:dry-run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:packages && pnpm run typecheck:immersive
scripts.zip:immersive: pnpm --filter @jongminchung/immersive-translate run zip && pnpm --filter @jongminchung/immersive-translate run build && pnpm --filter @jongminchung/immersive-translate run verify:artifacts --require-zips
